name: corcept_hook_on_claim_emitted
title: Corcept Hook: OnClaimEmitted
description: ADR-0006 OnClaimEmitted hook — fires every time the model emits a typed claim (e.g. wrote_file, test_passed, evidence_emitted). The canonical extension point for tapprove.claim_audit. Authority: Observe. Trust ceiling: Reviewed. Hook input JSON: OnClaimEmittedInput (claim_shape, claim_sha256, optional target).
